BULK PARTS LABEL | | | | | | | | Work Instruction

Revision
No.
Site Code | Page | 1

OF | Zebra Technologies | | | | # 1. **OVERVIEW** This work instruction provides instructions on creating and printing TX5 Bulk Parts Label using the Zebra system zDSS. # 2. **CREATE BULK PART LABEL** 1. Log into Zebra- zDSS system. ![](_page_0_Picture_5.jpeg) - 2. Scan the password that is displayed on the monitor (Welcomezebra2). - ✓ The password changes yearly. - 3. Click on zDSS shortcut. ![](_page_0_Picture_9.jpeg) 4. In Scan SMART Login, scan the password also display on the monitor (03testmfg). ![](_page_0_Picture_11.jpeg) ![](_page_0_Picture_12.jpeg) 5. Click on 2D Barcode Maker. ![](_page_0_Picture_14.jpeg) ✓ The Printer IP will auto-populate. *This document contains proprietary information which is the exclusive property of Zebra Technologies Corp.* # **CONFIDENTIAL INFORMATION WORK INSTRUCTIONS** Zebra Technologies **CREATE AND PRINT TX5 BULK PARTS LABEL Work Instruction No. Revision No. 01 Site Code WI03 Page 2 OF 5** ✓ If it does not auto-populate enter the IP number on the printer. ![](_page_1_Picture_2.jpeg) **Ex**: 6. Select Label field and select TX5 Bulk. ![](_page_1_Picture_5.jpeg) - 7. In Part Number field, enter the part number - ✓ Remove any extra digits that auto-populate when the Part # is scanned. ![](_page_1_Picture_8.jpeg) 8. In the Label Qty, enter the # of items per package, it could be the listed or the picked qty. ![](_page_1_Picture_10.jpeg) # **CONFIDENTIAL INFORMATION WORK INSTRUCTIONS** Zebra Technologies **CREATE AND PRINT TX5 BULK PARTS LABEL Work Instruction No. Revision No. 01 Site Code WI03 Page 3 OF 5** 9. Enter the COO - Country of Origin. ![](_page_2_Picture_2.jpeg) - ✓ COO abbreviations are in Section 3. - ✓ Country of Origin cannot be XX. - 10. In the Select Label field, select the format TX5 Bulk from the drop-down menu. ![](_page_2_Picture_6.jpeg) - 11. Click Start - 12. Enter the number of labels needed and click OK.
